name: ios-shipguard
description: ShipGuard guardrails and live-preview handoffs for solo iOS developers shipping permission-heavy apps.

interface.shortDescription: Guardrails and preview handoffs for iOS Codex work.
interface.longDescription: iOS ShipGuard helps Codex classify risky iOS work, inventory permissions and runtime surfaces, ask required product questions before editing, preview a simulator screen through Devspace, run clean first-run demos and deterministic evals, and route simulator, StoreKit, widget, notification, Codex handoff, privacy, and release proof through the right validation loop.
defaultPrompt: Run a first ShipGuard demo from this checkout.
Open ShipGuard Devspace for my simulator.
Send the latest preview event to Codex.
